title: Hjuksebø

infobox.value: This [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Hjukseb%C3%B8&action=edit).

is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located just south of [Hjuksevelta](/wiki/Hjuksevelta "Hjuksevelta"), roughly half-way between the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and the village of [Nordagutu](/wiki/Nordagutu "Nordagutu") (in [Midt-Telemark Municipality](/wiki/Midt-Telemark_(municipality) "Midt-Telemark (municipality)"). This village is located on the hills overlooking the eastern shore of the lake [Heddalsvatnet](/wiki/Heddalsvatnet "Heddalsvatnet"). In 2020, the Hjuksebø area became part of Notodden Municipality. Prior to that time, it was part of the old [Sauherad Municipality](/wiki/Sauherad_Municipality "Sauherad Municipality").[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

**Hjuksebø** is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located just south of [Hjuksevelta](/wiki/Hjuksevelta "Hjuksevelta"), roughly half-way between the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and the village of [Nordagutu](/wiki/Nordagutu "Nordagutu") (in [Midt-Telemark Municipality](/wiki/Midt-Telemark_(municipality) "Midt-Telemark (municipality)"). This village is located on the hills overlooking the eastern shore of the lake [Heddalsvatnet](/wiki/Heddalsvatnet "Heddalsvatnet"). In 2020, the Hjuksebø area became part of Notodden Municipality. Prior to that time, it was part of the old [Sauherad Municipality](/wiki/Sauherad_Municipality "Sauherad Municipality").[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hjukseb%C3%B8&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

[Hjuksebø Station](/wiki/Hjukseb%C3%B8_Station "Hjuksebø Station") is a former train station in this village. The station was located along the [Bratsberg Line](/wiki/Bratsberg_Line "Bratsberg Line").[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2) The [Hjuksebø train disaster](/wiki/Hjukseb%C3%B8_train_disaster "Hjuksebø train disaster") occurred between the Hjuksebø and [Holtsås](/wiki/Holts%C3%A5s "Holtsås") stations on 15 November 1950, and was Norway's worst railway accident in peacetime until the [Tretten train disaster](/wiki/Tretten_train_disaster "Tretten train disaster") in 1975.
